headline: American Express (AXP) Gets Price Target Hike from Freedom Broker despite Unchanged Outlook
summary: American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is included among the 10 Best “Dogs of the Dow” Stocks to Buy for the Rest of 2026. On May 14, Freedom Broker upgraded American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) to Buy from Hold. It also raised its price target on the stock to $370 from $325. The firm said American Express delivered […]

headline: Following Buffett: Greg Abel Cuts Berkshire Holdings Dating Back To 2011  — But The Big Names Stay Put
summary: Berkshire Hathaway changed its holdings in the first quarter, but its top 10 stocks look the same from the fourth quarter.

headline: Can Mastercard and JD.com Redefine Cross-Border Commerce?
summary: MA and JD.com team up on AI commerce, cross-border payments and fraud prevention to simplify global trade and improve travel shopping in China.

headline: Western Union Appoints Pedro Alegría as Vice President and General Manager for Mexico and Central America
summary: MEXICO CITY, May 18, 2026--Western Union Appoints Pedro Alegría as Vice President and General Manager for Mexico and Central America
